message:
fix(resolv_abi): add missing runtime_policy::observe() calls on all paths

getservbyname, getservbyport, getprotobyname, and getprotobynumber
were missing observe() calls on error paths (IO failures, lookup misses)
and success paths. This caused inconsistent membrane policy accounting.

Each function now correctly records:
- cost=10 for IO errors (reading /etc/services or /etc/protocols)
- cost=15 for lookup failures (entry not found)
- cost=20 for success (entry resolved to TLS storage)

Also adds complete decide()/observe() instrumentation to getprotobynumber
which had none at all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
